game.title: Harvest Scream
game.short_description: Farm by day, fix by night. A first-person farming horror where peaceful labor collides with terrifying anomaly hunts after dark. Gather resources, survive the monsters, and uncover the truth behind the corrupted simulation.
game.long_description:
Escape the routine. Face the anomaly. Survive the farm.

In Harvest Scream, you wake up in a lifeless office after endless hours of work. Your phone rings – your boss demands more, despite your exhaustion. After a bitter argument, you quit. But freedom never comes easy. Instead, you’re sent into Simulation Null – a corrupted farming world where everything broken, glitched, or unwanted from reality is discarded.

By day, you tend the farm. You plant, harvest, fish, care for bees, and try to build a life worth living. By night, you must venture into the forest, navigating through lurking monsters to hunt down anomalies – distortions born from the cracks of the simulation. Fixing them is the only way to restore balance and bring yourself closer to escape.

But farming is not your only challenge. Strange encounters, shifting weather, emotional choices, and a mysterious love story will test your sense of reality. Can you truly trust the people you meet, or are they part of the simulation’s deception?

Your goals are simple:

  • Earn enough money through farming, fishing, and other activities.
  • Repair all anomalies hidden in the corrupted world.
  • Discover the truth behind Simulation Null… and escape before it consumes you.

Key Features:

  • A haunting mix of farming life simulation and survival horror
  • Dynamic day and night cycle – farm under the sun, survive the horrors of night
  • Fishing, farming, beekeeping, animal care and more peaceful activities
  • Anomaly hunts – locate and fix corrupted entities hidden deep in the forest
  • Monsters and dangers that stalk you when darkness falls
  • Emotional storytelling blending burnout, freedom, and love
  • A mysterious romance that may not be what it seems
  • Dynamic weather system shaping atmosphere and survival

Will you find happiness in farming, or be consumed by the simulation’s horrors? The choice is yours – if you can survive long enough to make it.
